title: Score Entry & Controls
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Score Entry & Controls | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to enter scores quickly, use keyboard shortcuts, and navigate different game modes in Game Of Darts.
summary: Discover how score entry works across every game mode, along with supported keyboard shortcuts for faster scoring.
heroImageAlt: Game Of Darts score entry and controls

sections.heading: Easy Score Entry
paragraphs: Game Of Darts uses score entry designed specifically for each game mode, making it quick and intuitive whether you're playing X01, Cricket, Snooker, training games, or party modes.
Your current match is saved as you play, allowing you to pause and continue later without losing your progress.

sections.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
paragraphs: If you're using an external keyboard, Game Of Darts includes shortcuts to make score entry even faster.
In supported game modes, number keys enter scores, Enter confirms your selection, Delete removes the current entry, and U undoes the previous score.

images.alt: Game Of Darts score entry screen
images.caption: Quick and intuitive score entry.
